title: [FIRRTL] Zero Width Bug in Shift/Div Folders

features.name: zero_width_uint_in_shift_operation
features.description: Code should include a zero-width UInt type (UInt<0>) used as the first operand in a shift or divide operation where the result type has non-zero width
features.snippet:
circuit Foo:
  module Foo:
    input a: UInt<0>
    output b: UInt<1>
    b <= dshr(a, UInt<1>(1))
